title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 434.040 - Heirs may have the remedy
text:
434.040.  Heirs may have the remedy. — The heirs, executors, administrators, wife and creditors of the person losing, may have the same remedy against the winner as provided in section 434.030.
(RSMo 1939 § 3393, A.L. 1953 p. 321) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3006; 1919 § 5743; 1909 § 6624
